description: Screenshot of an online news article headline on a white background, with the publication's own typography rather than an agency-designed graphic. In small blue uppercase eyebrow text it reads 'LACKAWANNA COUNTY,' followed by a large bold black headline 'Lackawanna College announces plans to open 3 new skilled trade centers,' a short horizontal rule, then a gray summary paragraph: 'Lackawanna College plans to open three new satellite centers in Bethlehem, Chambersburg, and Greensburg, focusing on skilled trades.' A faint light-blue decorative half-circle hatched graphic sits in the lower right as the outlet's branding. The tweet references a 'Golden Age of the Skilled Trades.'
notable_text: Lackawanna College announces plans to open 3 new skilled trade centers
